# AppClipDefaultExperienceLocalizationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships

**Object**

The relationships to other resources that you can set with this request.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppClipDefaultExperienceLocalizationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships
```

## Objects

- **AppClipDefaultExperienceLocalizationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.AppClipDefaultExperience**: The relationship to the Default App Clip Experiences resource you set with the request that creates a Default App Clip Experience Localizations resource.

## Objects

- **AppClipDefaultExperienceLocalizationCreateRequest.Data.Attributes**: The attributes you set that describe the Default App Clip Experience Localizations resource.
